mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LEARN_COMMENT(IDX, CMT_CONTENT, USERNAME, NAME, NICK_NAME, ROLE, PROFILE) VALUES (#{idx}, #{cmt_content}, #{username}, #{name}, #{nick_name}, #{role}, #{profile})

SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CMT_IDX) + 1, 1) as cmt_idx, IFNULL(MAX(CMT_GROUP) + 1, 1) as cmt_group FROM LEARN_COMMENT
INSERT INTO LEARN_COMMENT(CMT_IDX, IDX, CMT_CONTENT, USERNAME, NAME, NICK_NAME, ROLE, PROFILE, CMT_GROUP, CMT_SEQUENCE, CMT_LEVEL, CMT_AVAILABLE) VALUES(#{cmt_idx}, #{idx}, #{cmt_content}, #{username}, #{name}, #{nick_name}, #{role}, #{profile}, #{cmt_group}, 0, 0, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM LEARN_COMMENT WHERE IDX = #{idx} AND CMT_LEVEL = 0 ORDER BY CMT_GROUP DESC, CMT_SEQUENCE ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE LEARN_COMMENT SET CMT_CMT_COUNT = CMT_CMT_COUNT + 1 WHERE CMT_GROUP = #{cmt_group} AND CMT_LEVEL = 0
mapper.insert:
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CMT_IDX) + 1, 1) as cmt_idx FROM LEARN_COMMENT
INSERT INTO LEARN_COMMENT(CMT_IDX, IDX, CMT_CONTENT, USERNAME, NAME, NICK_NAME, ROLE, PROFILE, CMT_GROUP, CMT_SEQUENCE, CMT_LEVEL, CMT_AVAILABLE) VALUES(#{cmt_idx}, #{idx}, #{cmt_content}, #{username}, #{name}, #{nick_name}, #{role}, #{profile}, #{cmt_group}, #{cmt_sequence}, #{cmt_level}, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT CMT_GROUP FROM LEARN_COMMENT WHERE CMT_IDX = #{cmt_idx}
SELECT * FROM LEARN_COMMENT WHERE IDX = #{idx} AND CMT_LEVEL = 1 AND CMT_GROUP = #{cmt_group} ORDER BY CMT_SEQUENCE ASC
